# Python Library Fixture

A minimal Python library with `src/` layout, no console scripts.

## Structure

- `pyproject.toml` — library-only (no `[project.scripts]`)
- `src/python_lib_repo/__init__.py` — public API surface
- `src/python_lib_repo/core.py` — core module
- `src/python_lib_repo/utils.py` — utility functions
